content_body:
Looking for a group of luxury cabin rentals that are side-by-side in order accommodate your large group? Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers the best cabin rentals in the North GA mountains along and near the Toccoa River for your group!

This collection of cabins are only 15 minutes from Downtown Blue Ridge and 10 minutes from the twin mountain towns of McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN. Both locations offer fun shopping and excellent dining. You will find yourself supremely located close to all the outdoor adventure outfitters, whether whitewater rafting, horseback riding, ziplining, and more.

A Rolling River Cabin, a 4 bedroom/3 bath cabin and The River's Edge, a 5 bedroom/3.5 bath lodge, are next to each other offering spectacular panoramic Toccoa River views. The River's Edge is closer to the river and has the easiest access for fly-fishing, tubing, or just basking in the sun on the river. A pathway from A Rolling River Cabin will easily get you down the hill to the Toccoa River.

Within a 1/4 mile of these cabins are Riverview Lodge and Outlaw Ridge, which are side-by-side and situated on top of a mountain ridge. The view of the North GA mountains and the Toccoa River meandering through these hills is quite a spectacular view. The ease of walking back and forth between these two cabins is optimal. There is a hiking path going down the mountain to access the property along the river's edge where there are picnic tables and fire pits. 

Directly below the hill from Riverview Lodge and Outlaw Ridge is Fallen Timber Lodge. This cabin rental has the easiest access to the river property below and river access. All three of these luxury cabins have the same floor plan offering 5 bedrooms/5.5 baths where each bedroom has its own private ensuite bath. Enjoy the spectacular views from the living area and loft where two-story glass windows bring the outdoor views inside.

The Great Getaway and High Hopes are located in close proximity to the afore-mentioned cabins in a gated community. The Great Getaway is a 4 bedroom/4.5 bath home that sleeps 14 and High Hopes, which is a short walking distance away, is a 4 bedroom/4 bath home that sleeps 8. Both luxury cabins have access to a pavilion along the Toccoa River located 1/4 mile away. 

Your family reunion or corporate retreat will make beautiful memories in this special place we have carved out of the North GA mountains along the Toccoa River.
title: Toccoa River Luxury Cabins Side by Side
